name: Webpage Reader
description: Read a specific URL. ONLY use when the user provides a link (https://...). Do NOT use for searching — use Search instead. Fetches and extracts text from a given webpage URL.
author: MUSE
planner_hint: REQUIRES a specific URL in the instruction. If you don't have a URL, use Search first to find one. Never send a vague topic — always include the actual https:// link.

actions.description: Read and extract text from a webpage URL
Read a webpage and provide a concise summary
